# Ahinsa Foundation (also known as Ahinsa Divine Foundation)

> Reiki healing, chakra balancing, distance healing, and Reiki classes (Level 1, 2, 3 & Master) led by Grand Master Anju Pahade (Mrs. Anju). Based in India; available in person and online worldwide.

Ahinsa Foundation — also searched as "Ahinsa Divine Foundation" or "Ahinsa Reiki" — is the Reiki and energy-healing practice of **Grand Master Anju Pahade**. All enquiries and bookings happen on WhatsApp.

## About Anju Pahade
- Reiki Grand Master and energy healer, 6+ years of practice
- Honoured by the International Book of Records and the Holistic Medicine Research Foundation
- 3,000+ lives touched and 400+ students attuned
- Teaches as well as heals — guiding students from Reiki Level 1 to Grand Master

## Services
- Reiki healing (hands-on energy healing)
- Distance healing (received anywhere in the world)
- Chakra and aura balancing
- Reiki classes and attunement: Level 1, Level 2, Reiki Master, and the Grand Master path
- Meditation and mindfulness guidance
- Crystal and aura healing
